463 N5B N5B_CHG_EXTENT_ACT (N5B) Extent of Involvement CHAR 1 Activity pursuit patterns: prefers change in daily routine - extent of involvement in activities. 0 = No Change, 1 = Slight Change, 2 = Major Change, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
